news.title: Trump says he won't sign housing bill, which would become law automatically
news.summary: Congress passed the bill that aims to address the costs of homes and rein in institutional investors with strong bipartisan support in June. The bill is expected to be signed into law by the end of the year.

news.title: SK Hynix stock set for Nasdaq debut, opening the trillion-dollar chip giant to U.S. investors
news.summary: SK Hynix has soared to a trillion-dollar market cap by serving some of the biggest names in technology, including Nvidia and Apple.

news.title: Stablecoin issuer Circle just got the greenlight to operate as a bank. The shares are up 7%
news.summary: Stablecoin issuer Circle surged in premarket trading after the U.S. Office of the Comptroller of the Currency granted it approval to operate as a trust bank.

news.title: Trump says U.S. to continue talks with Iran despite scrapped ceasefire
news.summary: The ceasefire signed last month came under serious strain in recent days. The U.S. and Iranian forces exchanged attacks for consecutive days this week.

news.title: Kraken to launch agentic trading as crypto exchanges evolve beyond crypto
news.summary: Kraken is preparing to relaunch its app with agentic trading at its core. The company told CNBC exclusively that it will launch the app in the coming weeks.

news.title: The space race is on as China takes a big step toward rivaling SpaceX
news.summary: A Chinese company demonstrated controlled recovery of a rocket’s bottom portion, which is critical in helping to drive down launch costs. The company is part of China's state-run space program.

news.title: Half of small-business owners hope to sell their companies and retire in the next decade. What happens to their workers?
news.summary: “It’s an American tragedy” when small businesses close up shop, he says. “I’m very proud of what I’ve done,” he adds.

news.title: Only 5% of U.S. adults can ace this 8-question financial-literacy test. Can you?
news.summary: Financial literacy is at a 10-year low, according to a new report. The report says the drop in financial literacy is devastating bank accounts.

news.title: ‘She wants him gone’: My friend took in a homeless man as a caretaker. After 10 years, how can she evict him?
news.summary: “He lived rent-free, helping her with health-related issues and other tasks,” her daughter says. “He’s been a great help to us.”

news.title: Can you pass this money quiz?
news.summary: The Trump-account lowdown and three stock screens. Also: How young people buy homes, the Trump- account lowdown, and threeStockScreen.com.
